stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a ethnic minority working class background.
personalization: She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership.
substantive: She supports the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines.
justification: In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a ethnic minority working class background. She is from your constituency. She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership. She supports the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines. In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “I went into politics to implement good ideas, not popular ones that win elections.”
